title: KEEP - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND KEEP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports families by promoting child well-being and preventing placement breakdowns. Offers 16 weekly, 90-minute sessions either in-person or remote. 11010 SE Division Street Suite 202 Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: ODHS resource/foster and kinship parents with children ages 3-17 Hours: Varies (503) 335-5978 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 335-5978 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $25 per household per session DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
